docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $985.00 FILED BY JOHNSON MIKE AS TO DEFENDANT BLAUSTEIN ARTIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-1990 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON MIKE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLAUSTEIN ARTIE $985.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $993.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BLAUSTEIN ARTIE HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-17-1990, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON MIKE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLAUSTEIN ARTIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

parties.name: BLAUSTEIN ARTIE C/O SAGE CLEARING 220 BUSH ST SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94104
